subcodes.first_line: O my God and my Lord! I call upon Thee at this moment with the cry which Thou didst inspire in me through the wondrous bounties of Thy oneness and hast taught me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی و سیدی انادیک حینئذ بندآء الذی الهمتنی من بدایع جود احدیتک و علمتنی
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
